title: portulaca oligosperma
intro: Portulaca oligosperma, also known as dwarf spurge or small-seeded portulaca, is a species of flowering plant in the purslane family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include soothing skin irritations, treating wounds, and reducing fever, making it a valuable herbal remedy in various cultures. Portulaca oligosperma can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or topical applications, highlighting its potential as a natural treatment for various health conditions.
